title: Cymax 12 Pack Artificial Christmas Pine Picks, Assorted Floral Picks Red Berry Pinecone Stem Faux Tree Picks for Christmas Wreath Festive Winter Season
features: Package Contents:Includes12 packs of high-quality pine snowy flower picks.Sizes range from 11cm to 22cm, and the flexible wired stems cater to various crafting needs.

Materials:Crafted from silk, plastic, and foam, these faux plants exhibit remarkable realism. Their wired stems wrapped in brown floral tape make them easy to shape and arrange for your desired decor.

Color Design:These classic Christmas stems feature pine, holly leaves, or green leaves as the base, embellished with holiday elements like red or burgundy berries, snowy pinecones, natural pinecones, and red apples. Some even have an iced appearance for a wintry touch.

Features:These Christmas red berry picks are crafted from snowy pine cones, green holly leaves, red berries, and more. Each is securely attached to a flexible craft stick, making them ideal for gift wrapping and holiday craft projects.

Applications:Perfect for festive decorations, these Christmas Berry Twig Branches can enhance your Christmas tree, garland wreaths, centerpieces, holiday floral arrangements, table settings, gift wrapping, winter weddings, and more.
description: Assorted Holiday Elegance: These Christmas stems feature a base of pine, holly leaves, or green leaves, adorned with a delightful mix of holiday elements, such as red berries, snowy pinecones, natural pinecones, red apples. The combination of festive plants creates timeless classic sprays that will remain a favorite for years. Intricate Realism: Crafted from silk, plastic, and foam, these faux plants boast astonishingly lifelike details. They are affixed to flexible wired stems wrapped in brown floral tape, making them easy to shape and arrange for the perfect decoration. Artificial Berry Picks require minimal maintenance and retain a fresh appearance. Seamless Holiday Integration: Enhance your holiday ambiance by incorporating these berry picks into your Christmas tree, garlands, wreaths, or swags. Add a delightful touch to Christmas gifts. Create complete arrangements using several picks or use them as accent pieces in floral displays. Place them in vases, baskets, canisters, tin buckets, or on candle trays to infuse a bit of Christmas spirit. Pair them with vibrant spherical ornaments, lay them flat on tables, or incorporate them into beautiful centerpieces.
